items.headline: Iran fires on Israel and Gulf neighbors as Trump claims threat from Tehran nearly eliminated
items.summary: Iran's attacks on Gulf states along with its chokehold on the Strait of Hormuz have disrupted the world's energy supplies with effects far beyond the Middle East. That has proved to be Iran's greatest strategic advantage in the war.
